name: Virtual Hosts Finder
description: Find multiple websites hosted on the same server.
long_description: Find multiple websites hosted on the same server.

fields.label: Target Host/IP
fields.help: Enter the target domain or IP address to probe for virtual hosts. Example: secuscan.in or 192.168.1.1. Ensure you have authorization before scanning.

fields.label: Subdomain Wordlist
fields.help: Absolute path to a wordlist file containing subdomain names to fuzz. Defaults to the SecLists top 1 million subdomains list. Use a smaller list for faster scans.

safety.consent_message: Virtual host probing is active scanning. Ensure authorization.
